title: Podman 6: deprecate config-based image ID
body:
Podman 6 should contain a deprecation announcement, along the lines of

> In Podman < 6, image IDs were for v2s2 and OCI images were always equal to the sha256 digest of the image’s config data.
>
> A future version of Podman 6 will add support for using other digests than sha256, and the image ID format will change for images which are not entirely sha256-based.
>
> The exact format of the image IDs is not yet decided, but applications should stop assuming that they are equal to config digests, or that they are digests at all.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
